comment: FR-SPD-002 within-clip freeze, late sample: same clip as time-remap-freeze-hold-early (curve 0->0, 1/4->1, 3/2->1) sampled a full 3/4s later at t=5/4. The zero-slope span must still decode source frame 128 — the two fixtures share identical reference content, which is exactly the held-frame guarantee. Ignoring the curve (1x) would decode frame 160 and the constant-rate chord (2/3x) would decode frame 106; both are >= 22 green levels away, beyond the deltaE tolerance.
